name: BackToTop
usage_hint: Floating scroll-to-top button that appears after scrolling past threshold. Fixed bottom-right position.
when_to_use: On long pages (>2 screens) where users need quick return to top. Auto-shows/hides based on scroll position. Respects reduced-motion preferences.
when_not_to_use: On short pages (less than 1000px tall). When footer already has "Back to top" link. On mobile-first designs where scroll is fast.
anti_patterns: Setting threshold too low (<400px) — button appears before user needs it
Using on pages with sticky sidebars that occupy bottom-right (z-index conflicts)
Multiple BackToTop instances — only one is needed per page
